title: ASR Outdoor Complete Mini Sluice Box with 3.5 Gal Bucket Gold Panning Kit, 20pc
description:

ASR Outdoor Complete Mini Sluice Box with 3.5 Gal Bucket Gold Panning Kit, 20pc

If you’re looking for a start to finish sluice box gold prospecting kit, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 20pc Complete Portable Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit. Intended for end to end raw material processing, this kit includes a comprehensive selection of prospecting tools needed for classification, collection and storage, and is incredibly portable!

And, while the mini 12 inch mini rubber sluice box, drawstring backpack and 3.5 gallon bucket make this kit easy to trek to and from a claim site, the supplementary components we’ve included ensure you’re never compromising on the range of prospecting tools or processes needed for a successful day in the field.

Key Features

  • GOLD PANNING KIT: ASR Outdoors’ 20pc complete rubber sluice box kit with 3.5 gallon bucket and mini classifier screens is intended for start to finish raw material processing; kit includes everything for collection, recovery and storage and is easily portable!
  • 12 INCH RUBBER SLUICE BOX: Sluice box features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold; weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment
  • CLASSIFIER SCREENS: Stack x3 mini sifting screens on top of gold pans to create a seamless material classification system, which removes unwanted material from your pay dirt concentrate, ideal for gold panning or feeding mini rubber sluice box
  • DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: This gold panning kit comes with a drawstring backpack to hold smaller prospecting tools, keeping them together and organized; drawstring backpack is incredibly lightweight, adding to the transportability of this gold panning kit
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS: Gold panning kit also includes x4 snuffer bottles, x1 8lbs magnetic separator tool, x1 green prospectors scoop, x3 glass vials, x1 pair of magnifying tweezers and a 3 in 1 compact folding shovel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRMBKTSKO
  • UPC: 810131708559
  • Color: Green
  • Size: Large

The compact 3 in 1 folding shovel and bucket make a great place to start gathering raw material. Once you’ve filled your bucket, transfer the raw material to stacked mini classifier screens that will sit on top of chosen included dual riffle green gold pans (10, 12 or 14 inch); You’ve now created an effective classification system to remove undesirable material like rocks and gravel from your pay dirt concentrate. However, before you start panning or sluicing, be sure grab that large 8lb magnetic separator tool! This will help to remove black sand and any other heavy magnetic materials, making it easier to separate and extract gold from your pay dirt.

Whether you choose to feed your mini rubber sluice or work on gold panning techniques, you’ve got both options with this kit! The 12 inch mini sluice box made from one piece of thermoplastic rubber features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold. And, weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment. Alternatively, the gold pans included are dual riffle with both a shallow and deep sidewall riffle design; they measure 10, 12 and 14 inches, are molded from one piece of high impact ABS plastic, are lightweight, rust and UV resistant, buoyant in water, and are suitable for all levels of gold prospectors.

If you’re lucky enough to spot gold, you can use the included snuffer bottles to extract gold flakes or nuggets and store them in the screw top glass vials for safe keeping. If not, well, we’re sorry to say, it’s back to the bucket. Good luck out there!
